chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1287 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 5463/2023 3.For hearing of main case 19-09-2023 Syed Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition for the reasons that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
